characters.name: Aditya Singh
characters.description: This article is aboutthe character from the Netflix series. You may be looking forDr. Singh, the character from the graphic novel series. Aditya SinghBiographical informationAliasesAdi (byRani Singh)RelativesRani Singh(Wife)AffiliationLast Men(Formerly)Gus(Briefly)OccupationMedical ResearcherDoctorStatusDeceasedPhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderMaleHeight5'6Eye colordark brownAppearancesFirst appearanceOut of the Deep WoodsPortrayed byAdeel Akhtar Dr. Aditya Singhis a main character and deuteragonist ofSweet Tooth. He is a close friend and former colleague ofGladys Bell. Adi's wife,Rani, lives withthe Sick, albeit discreetly. Adi is relentless in his quest to find a cure for the virus and save his wife, even if it means working with theLast Men.

characters.name: Aimee Eden
characters.description: Aimee EdenBiographical informationRelativesWendy Eden(Adopted Daughter)Thomas Jepperd(Ally, Friend)Gus(Friend)Rebecca Walker(Friend)AffiliationThe PreserveStatusDeceasedPhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleAppearancesFirst appearanceOut of the Deep WoodsPortrayed byDania Ramirez Aimee Edenis a main character inSweet Toothand the former proprietor ofthe Preserve. Formerly a counselor before the Great Crumble, Aimee used the zoo estate to rescuehybridsand keep them safe from theLast Men, along with her adoptive daughterWendy.

characters.description: This article is aboutthe character from the graphic novel series. You may be looking forBecky (Netflix), the character from the Netflix series. BeckyBiographical informationOccupationProstitute (formerly)Physical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleEye colorBlueAppearancesFirst appearanceSweet Tooth#3Last appearanceSweet Tooth #40 Beckyis a prostitute who was rescued byGusandJepperd. Becky is a somewhat kind girl (taking into account the ethics of the other characters in the work) but is occasionally submissive. She has a special affection for hybrids.

characters.name: Becky (Netflix)
characters.description: This article is aboutthe character from the Netflix series. You may be looking forBecky, the character from the graphic novel series. Rebecca WalkerBiographical informationAliasesBearBeckyRelativesUnnamed parentsUnnamed adoptive parents † (deceased)Wendy Eden(adoptive sister)Tiger † (Best Friend)Gus(Friend)Aimee Eden† (Friend)AffiliationAnimal Army (Formerly)Wendy EdenOccupationLeader of the Animal Army (Formerly)StatusAliveBorn16/09/2006Physical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleEye colorBlueAppearancesFirst appearance"Weird Deer S**t"Portrayed byStefania LaVie OwenRebecca Walker, also known asBeckyand occasionallyBear, is a 16-year-old human and founder of the Animal Army. Becky Becky is observant and keen of intellect, discovering Big Man's past as a Last Man. Unlike her rival Tiger, she is not ruthless and realizes it's a mistake to execute Big Man, despite the consequences. She is strong-minded and determined, yet lacks Big Man's experience, bickering with him until Gus insists, they stop fighting. Her personality remains complex and dynamic for an individual. However the situation may be, she will attempt to make a sensible choice based on her judgement. While she does happen to maintain a rough exterior, she shows a tactful and benevolent side, especially around hybrid children, such asAimee Eden's children.

characters.name: Birdie
characters.description: Gertrude MillerBiographical informationAliasesBirdieRelativesRichard Fox†(Co-worker, Love interest)Gus(Creation)Unnamed Husband †(Deceased)AffiliationFort Smith (formerly)OccupationGeneticist (formerly)StatusDeceased (Stabbed by Singh)Physical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleAppearancesFirst appearance"Out of the Deep Woods"(Picture)"Big Man"(Physical)Last appearance"The Road Ends Here" "Big Man"(Physical) Dr. Gertrude Miller, also known asBirdie, was a geneticist at Fort Smith Labs and co-worker ofRichard Fox. A talented geneticist, she was responsible for the creation of the firsthybrid,Gus, who she entrusted into the protection of Richard. Whilst a devoted geneticist, Birdie seemed relatively attached to Gus, the hybrid that she had created from the microorganisms she discovered. Her devotion and protective feelings towards Gus led her to pleading with Richard to leave Fort Smith and protect Gus with his life. She also has a love of music, specifically the song "Keep on Truckin'" by Eddy Kendricks, which she bonds with Pubba over.

characters.name: Bobby
characters.description: This article is aboutthe character from the graphic novel series. You may be looking forBobby (Netflix), the character from the Netflix series. BobbyBiographical informationAliasesChewie (by Johnny Abbot)StatusAlivePhysical descriptionSpeciesHuman-GroundhogGenderMaleEye colorBlackAppearancesFirst appearanceSweet Tooth #6Last appearanceSweet Tooth #40 Bobbyis one of the many animal-hybrid children incarcerated at The Preserve. Bobby is one of the more animal-like hybrids, as such he can only speak in fragmented, chittering speech, but is still cognitive, and is a close companion toWendy. He becomes friends withGusshortly after the deer boy arrives at the facility. Bobby is a demure hybrid who is wary of humans barring Johnny, due to his upbringing inside the Preserve enclosure. Being more animal than human, Bobby shares several traits with groundhogs, such as hibernating during winter and having a chittering cadence in his voice. In spite of his habits, Bobby greatly cares about his friends and those who help him. He can dig and stuff.

characters.description: Buddy JepperdBiographical informationRelativesThomas Jepperd(father, deceased)Louise Jepperd(mother, deceased)Physical descriptionSpeciesHuman-DonkeyGenderMaleEye colorBrownAppearancesFirst appearanceSweet Tooth#6Last appearanceSweet Tooth#40 Buddy Jepperdis one of the many animal hybrid children atThe Preserve. characters.name: Christian Convery
characters.description: Christian ConveryGeneralNationalityCanadianBornNovember 11th 2009Age15Role(s)Cast member(Gus)OccupationActor Christian ConveryPhysical descriptionHeight5ft 2.99 or 160 cm Christian Converyis a remarkably talented young actor who has quickly captured the hearts of audiences around the world. Best known for his breakout role as Gus, the lovable half-human, half-deer character in the Netflix seriesSweet Tooth, Christian's journey into the entertainment industry has been shaped by his natural talent and an unwavering passion for acting. Born onNovember 10, 2009, inLos Angeles, California, Christian's story is one of dedication, hard work, and a deep love for storytelling. Christian’s love for acting grew as he immersed himself in both on-stage and on-screen opportunities. His early years were marked by a combination of play-based exploration and a focused study of acting, as he began to build the skills that would eventually lead him to the professional stage. He participated in various school plays and community theater productions, learning the fundamentals of performance and storytelling, as well as honing his ability to portray a wide range of emotions. He portrays the role ofGusinSweet Tooth.

characters.name: Clara Cat
characters.description: Clara is a half white cat half human hybrid girl who is Nuka’s older sister. She also have the ability to sniff things and is also intelligent and brave. Due to her catgirl hybrid appearance her mouth is sometimes in a cat shape due to her feline features, She and her younger sister Nuka get along very well. Clara is a well-behaved catgirl meaning she follows the rules very well and she is also independent too, In the first season episode of Sweet Tooth Season 3 we can see Clara and Nuka hanging out with each other. If anyone tries to mess with Clara she will hiss at them to scare them away. Clara is portrayed by Giada Lee while her younger sister Nuka is portrayed by Ayazhan Dalabayeva.

characters.name: Douglas Abbot (Netflix)
characters.description: This article is aboutthe character from the Netflix series. You may be looking forDouglas Abbot, the character from the graphic novel series. Douglas AbbotBiographical informationAliasesAbbotGeneral AbbotRelativesUnnamed FatherJohnny Abbot(younger brother) +OccupationGeneralLeader of the Last MenStatusDeceasedPhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderMaleAppearancesFirst appearanceWeird Deer S**tLast appearance"The Ballad of the Last Men"Portrayed by"Neil Sandilands" Douglas Abbot (Netflix)is the main antagonist ofSweet ToothfromSeason 1-Season 2. He is a former U.S. Army soldier and officer, and  the self-appointed general for theLast Men, a post-apocalyptic paramilitary army formed around a core of ex-military  like himself. General Abbot comes across as being rather friendly and polite, but as it is quickly revealed, he is ruthless, merciless and sometimes cruel  and who does what it takes to get what he desires, even if that means killing others.  Even so, this ruthlessness and cruelty is born of not only  of  selfishness but of selflessness. On one hand he  is villainous and has taken advantage of the collapse of society to reinvent himself and claim power, and he revels in his vaulted position, but he also is altruistic, and he  truly believes he is "the good guy of the story" a  loyal soldier only trying to help restore his country. Abbot is ultimately a complicated individual who leads through wit, intimidation and quirkiness, but lead he does, for good or ill.

characters.name: Gillian Washington
characters.description: She is the one who started The Sick.

characters.name: Gladys Bell
characters.description: Gladys BellBiographical informationAffiliationLast MenOccupationMedical ResearcherDoctorStatusDeceasedPhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleAppearancesFirst appearance"Sorry About All the Dead People"Last appearance"What's in the Freezer?"Portrayed bySarah Peirse Dr. Gladys Bellwas a recurring character inSweet Tooth. A brilliant doctor and researcher, Dr. Bell formerly lead the charge to find a cure for the virus affecting humanity, and was initially successful in creating a booster shot that allowedRani Singhto live with the virus. Despite her brilliance, Glady's methods were uncanny with ethical complications. She eventually retired from her duties after discovering she was afflicted by stage four cancer. She was later killed byDouglas Abbot, who falsely believed she was faking her illness to escape his employ.  Little is known about Glady's personality, except that she was prepared to go to extreme lengths to find a cure for the virus. Her methods were controversial, however, and included experimenting and dissectinghybridchildren to study them. These methods eventually led to the creation of the booster shot, butAdiwas reluctant to continue her research after reading the documentation pertaining to her methods.

characters.name: Gus (Netflix)
characters.description: This article is aboutcharacter from the Netflix series. You may be looking forGus, the character from the graphic novels. GusBiographical informationAliasesSweet Tooth (by Jepperd)RelativesRichard Fox† (Guardian, Father figure)*Birdie† (Creator/Mother figure)Thomas Jepperd(Friend, Guardian)Wendy Eden(Friend/Wife/Lover)StatusAliveBornFebruary 2nd 2011Physical descriptionSpeciesHuman-Deer HybridGenderMaleHeight1.59Weight86 lbsEye colorGreenAppearancesFirst appearance"Out of the Deep Woods"Portrayed byChristian Convery(young)James Brolin(Older) Known by his human name Gus,Genetic Unit Series 1is the protagonist of the Netflix seriesSweet Tooth.  10-year-old (Seasons 1-2, 12 years old in Season 3.) child with the genes of a deer and human, Gus was born near the beginning of a terrifying pandemic and raised in total isolation all his life. A year after his guardian's death, Gus yearned to find his mother and traveled with the mysteriousThomas Jepperdto search for answers. Gus has a vivid imagination. He created an entire little task force of straw animals to "help" him with his chores and keep him company. He created and then "fought" an army of snowmen, later describing the encounter to a scarecrow-like construction meant to resemble his deceased Pubba. His imagination helped keep him sane in the midst of overwhelming loneliness, but he ultimately found that his imaginary friends were not enough and destroyed them in a fire, nearly burning up Dog as well before snatching him out of flames.[7]Gus is generally an extremely optimistic and hopeful person, but occasionally the hardships of his life break through and cause him to lose control, during which times he is inclined to run away and try to destroy or throw away even things that are very precious to him.[8] At first Gus was scared of every human because of the way his adopted dad taught him, but as time went on, his trust towards humans grew to the point of travelling with two humans. Gus is also stubborn, as when he found out where his birth mother might be he would stop at nothing to get there.

characters.name: Helen Zhang
characters.description: Helen ZhangBiographical informationRelativesUnnamed husband (deceased)Rosie Zhang(daughter)Ginger Zhang (daughter)Bruno (grandson, deceased)Three unnamed wolf hybrids (grandsons)Unnamed seal hybrid (grandson/granddaughter)AffiliationBadStatusAlivePhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleEye colorDark BrownAppearancesFirst appearanceWhat It TakesLast appearanceThis Is a StoryPortrayed byRosalind Chao Helen Zhangis one of the main characters of theNetflixseriesSweet ToothinSeason 3where she serves as the main antagonist. She is first introduced inSeason 2. But by the following season, she is attempting to put an end to thehybridsand save the humans from the brink of extinction.

characters.name: Jimmy Jacobs
characters.description: This article is aboutthe character from the graphic novel series. You may be looking forJimmy Jacobs (Netflix), the character from the Netflix series. Jimmy JacobsBiographical informationAliasesFat ManOccupationPlymouth Hounds hockey player (formerly)StatusDeceasedPhysical descriptionGenderMaleEye colorBrownAppearancesFirst appearanceSweet Tooth #30Last appearanceSweet Tooth #38 Jimmy "Fat Man" Jacobsis a character inSweet Tooth. Prior to the outbreak, he was the defense man for the Plymouth Hounds who became acquainted withThomas Jepperdduring the championship semi-finals. As a survivor of the sick, he lived in near-isolation with a crowhybridhe raised for more than a decade.

Johnny AbbotBiographical informationRelativesDouglas Abbot(older brother, deceased)Father (deceased)AffiliationThe PreserveStatusDeceasedPhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderMaleAppearancesFirst appearanceSweet Tooth#11Last appearanceSweet Tooth#34 Johnny Abbotis a caretaker atThe Preserveand the younger brother ofDouglas Abbot. He has a tendency to free those imprisoned in The Preserve.

characters.description: Johnny AbbotBiographical informationRelativesDouglas Abbot (Brother)Unnamed MotherAffiliationLast men (formerOccupationRight hand manStatusDeadPhysical descriptionGenderMaleAppearancesPortrayed byMarlon Williams Unnamed Mother  Johnny is a kind hearted man. characters.name: Junior
characters.description: JuniorPhysical descriptionSpeciesHuman-Owl HybridGenderMaleAppearancesFirst appearanceWhat's in the Freezer?Last appearanceBig Man Junioris a hybrid who lives at thePreserve. He is part owl. Junior was born after the Great Crumble. His kind were feared and hated because it was believed that they caused the Sick. Other details of his early life are unknown, but at some point he came to live at the Preserve in Colorado under the care ofAimee Edenand her adopted daughterWendy. He remained there in relative safety untilGeneral Abbottand hisLast Mentook over the Preserve, at which point he became a captive. Junior is known to be somewhat reclusive. When Aimee suggests that Wendy try to play with him, Wendy replies that he "never leaves his tree anymore."[1]
characters.personality_section: Junior is known to be somewhat reclusive. When Aimee suggests that Wendy try to play with him, Wendy replies that he "never leaves his tree anymore."[1]

characters.name: Louise Jepperd
characters.description: Louise JepperdBiographical informationRelativesThomas Jepperd(husband)Buddy Jepperd(son)StatusDeceasedPhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleEye colorBlueAppearancesFirst appearanceSweet Tooth#6 Louise Jepperdwas the wife ofThomas Jepperd. Louise was an artsy girl from New York living with Jepperd of the Minnesota Wildcats. In the early days of the plague, Louise and Tommy would get together with large groups of people in order to feel safe. Eventually, Louise and her husband left the group deciding it would be best to live on their own to avoid spreading the plague. At some point, Louise became pregnant with their child.

characters.name: Maya Monkey
characters.description: Maya Monkey is one of the manyHybrid'swho were raised byAimee Eden. Maya MonkeyBiographical informationStatusAlivePhysical descriptionSpeciesMonkey-Human HybridGenderFemaleHeight3ft 6inEye colorDark brownAppearancesPortrayed byAmie DonaldMaya Monkeyis a recurring character introduced in Season 2 ofSweet Tooth, a Netflix series based on the DC comic by Jeff Lemire. A hybrid girl with distinct monkey traits, Maya quickly becomes a fan-favorite due to her acrobatic agility, fierce loyalty, and emotionally complex personality. Introduced as a quiet, elusive presence living alone in the treetops, Maya eventually joins Gus and his family of hybrids, forming particularly close bonds withGus,Wendy, and the others.  Maya is a quiet yet deeply expressive hybrid whose guarded demeanor masks a fiercely loyal and emotionally intuitive heart. Initially wary and slow to trust, she relies more on body language, subtle gestures, and soft vocalizations than spoken words—especially when around unfamiliar people. Her silence isn’t shyness, but caution; a survival instinct honed by a world that hasn’t always been kind to those like her. Once her walls begin to come down, Maya reveals a remarkably affectionate and protective nature. Her loyalty runs deep, and her attachments are intense—often bordering on possessive. To those she deems family, Maya is a constant shadow: comforting, watchful, and unwavering in her devotion. Maya’s character embodies the complex emotional landscape of a child forced to grow up too fast. Her strength lies not just in her agility or survival skills, but in her profound emotional intelligence, her fierce devotion, and the quiet, constant love she gives to those who earn her trust.

characters.name: Nuka
characters.description: Nuka FoxBiographical informationRelativesSiana (Mother)AffiliationBirdie (Friend)Gus (Friend)Big Man (aka Jeppard) (Friend)Bear (aka Becky) (Friend)Wendy (Friend)StatusAlivePhysical descriptionSpeciesHybrid - Arctic FoxGenderFemaleEye colorBlueAppearancesFirst appearance"The Beginning is Also the End"Last appearance"This Is a Story"Portrayed byAyazhan Dalabayeva Gus (Friend)Big Man (aka Jeppard) (Friend)Bear (aka Becky) (Friend)Wendy (Friend)  Nuka is intelligent, sly, and curious. She shows great skill in assisting the now leader of the base, Siana, in leading and decision making. Nuka's known to be a thief at the base, stealing and pickpocketing despite her mother's best attempts to scold her. According to the fish she stole in her jacket when her mom (Siana) asked if she stole anything she might like fish.
